title: Got an Extra $5K? Ayaneo Next 2 Handheld Is Back on Sale With Higher Price
summary: In March, Ayaneo said it would "consider resuming the sale of the Next 2” if it saw “storage prices return to more reasonable levels.” That hasn’t happened due to the ongoing global storage crisis, but Ayaneo appears to have seen enough demand…
